items.question: What is HappyHorse 1.0?
items.answer: HappyHorse 1.0 (also known as Happy Horse AI) is an open-source AI video generation model with 15B parameters, ranked #1 on the Artificial Analysis benchmark. It supports native 1080p output, audio sync, and multi-shot generation.

items.question: How to access the HappyHorse 1.0 model?
items.answer: HappyHorse 1.0 is coming soon to AI Video Generator Free. Once live, you can access Happy Horse 1.0 directly from our AI video generator — no setup required. Sign up now to get notified and receive free credits on launch day.

items.question: How to run Happy Horse AI model?
items.answer: When HappyHorse 1.0 launches on our platform, running Happy Horse AI is simple: sign in, select HappyHorse 1.0 from the model list, enter your text prompt or upload an image, and click Generate. No local installation or GPU required — it runs entirely in the cloud.

items.question: Is HappyHorse 1.0 available now?
items.answer: HappyHorse 1.0 is not yet available on our platform but is coming soon. You can sign up to be notified when Happy Horse AI goes live. In the meantime, try our other top models like Seedance 2.0, Kling 3.0, and Wan 2.7.

items.question: Why is HappyHorse 1.0 ranked #1?
items.answer: Happy Horse AI achieves the highest scores on the Artificial Analysis video generation benchmark, outperforming proprietary models in quality, consistency, and prompt adherence.

items.question: Is HappyHorse 1.0 free to use?
items.answer: Yes — HappyHorse 1.0 is open source and free. When it launches on our platform, you can try Happy Horse AI with free sign-up credits, no credit card required.

items.question: How does HappyHorse compare to Seedance, Kling, and Wan?
items.answer: HappyHorse 1.0 is the only open-source model ranked #1 on Artificial Analysis. It matches or exceeds proprietary models in quality while offering the transparency and customization benefits of open source.
